output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?founderLabel ?headquartersLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q32156 wdt:P161 ?founder ; wdt:P159 ?headquarters .
  ?founder rdfs:label ?founderLabel
  FILTER(LANG(?founderLabel) = 'en')
  .
  ?headquarters rdfs:label ?headquartersLabel
  FILTER(LANG(?headquartersLabel) = 'en')
}
